name: Wellesta
description: Mischief Mouse's grandpa.

name: Auntie Mulberry
description: A bunny with purple hair and a bright red apron who lives in a cottage and enjoys baking magical pies.

name: Poda
description: A member of the Blind Mice family.

name: Dad
description: Kitty’s father remains a pillar of steady eccentricity, an unflappable co-pilot and accommodating listener who balances technical logistics with a patient support for his daughter’s restless need for activity. He manages mission equipment with the same meticulous intensity he once brought to scanning the midnight undergrowth for missing cats, his stoicism famously underscored by the irony of a nagging knee complaint—diagnosed as overgrown toenails—that never wavers his resolve.

name: Bruly
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Roo
description: A resident of the Hundred Acre Wood.

name: Space Yoda
description: A figure who helps with the mission until their batteries run low.

name: Cashier
description: The person at the grocery store who scans the rainbow-colored mushrooms.

name: Wizard Pizizzard
description: A magical being who has traveled to the Floofer Cloud and met Siffle Papiffle.

name: Shadow Uncle Bill
description: A shadow puppet character introduced at the end of the session.

name: Rainbow Snake
description: A colorful resident of the sunroom that Silver curls up with.

name: Shiliko
description: Dimitar's mother who helps organize the trip to the party.

name: Floofer Kaploofer
description: A white floofer who gets lost and stuck in orange sand.

name: Butterfly Hedgehog
description: A hybrid paper creature adorned with sparkles.

name: Ralph
description: A mouse character who lives within the pages of a book.

name: Papamoles
description: A character mentioned during the initial forest encounter.

name: Cubby Chickendoll
description: A tiny wolf cub who gets lost and is eventually found hiding under a violin.

name: Hatty
description: A friend of Finn who sheared a sheep and knitted him a warm purple hat.

name: Oscar Mouse
description: Roused by the spring warmth of a forested green planet, this tiny mouse artisan dwells within a small house of weathered stone. Having migrated from a drafty attic to the crystalline sanctuary of a sugar can, he works deep within his dark, stony cupboard, meticulously mending every dent with the smooth application of squeak oil.

name: Nana Mouse
description: The welcoming grandmother mouse who has many toys.

name: Wobbly Whisker
description: A small kitten who gets lost on the Planet of the Mookers and becomes very sticky.

name: Sea Mice
description: Tiny and mysterious, these aquatic denizens inhabit a sovereign kingdom anchored to the crushing depths of the absolute ocean floor.

name: A little star
description: A celestial body encountered by Mickey and Minnie that does not have a mouth.

name: Pinecone Mouse
description: As tall as a garden wall and driven by an insatiable hunger, this colossal mouse dwells within a tiny, precarious house perched among the highest needles of a swaying pine tree.

name: Pa Pig
description: The father of the pig family who helps dig out their car.

name: Kermit
description: The leader of the Muppets who goes on a quest to buy back his old house.

name: Jim a Beaver
description: A beaver who creates dents in the spaceship's air conditioner.

name: Nana Robot
description: A robot friend that Zigzag draws on a sketchboard.

name: Yahoo
description: A member of the group who wakes up at three in the morning.

name: Floofer Fershika
description: A jellyfish-like flying creature from the top of the thunder cloud who loves being a hat.

name: Baby Shark
description: A high-energy creature in the petting area that is compared to a truck because of its power.

name: Mysterious Traveler
description: A character from the past who delivered a rubbery potion to Dad.

name: Isabella
description: A towering Dimatar scholar and alchemist of Atsukeeseet, Mama Izzy is a clever kiddo at heart and a steadfast guardian of rooftop gardens and intricate dollhouses. Gifted with the power of flight, she navigates the open heights with aquatic grace, her massive frame often shielded by a special protective metal that glimmers even as she descends into the shadows. As a resourceful quartermaster, she employs red flashlights, gold-laced slimes, and pipe cleaners to mend a Lanternshark’s failing light, yet her generosity remains her hallmark; she freely shares her vast library, brokers homes for dragons, and teaches others to find the resonance in their own voices. Her most profound magic resides in her vast, soft blanket—a sanctuary of ultimate coziness—where she remains a brave, quick-witted protector to all who honor her singular request for absolute silence.

name: Yellow Mergirl
description: A member of the Mergirls who live underwater.

name: The Owls
description: Nocturnal birds that hoot and contribute to the starlight atmosphere around the basket.

name: Vijaya
description: A shooting star that can transform into a hair clip and lead adventures across the sky.

name: The Mouse
description: A small creature mentioned as being the one who eats all the nut snacks.

name: Frasgle
description: An enthusiastic blur of multi-colored fluff, this alien assistant maintains the ship’s batteries with sticky, sap-coated precision. Though their only mode of communication is a series of thunderous roars, their dedication to the vessel’s power cells is as unmistakable as the fragrant, resinous trail they leave throughout the engine room.

name: Molly
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Neto
description: One of the residents of Mischief Mouse's house.

name: Furry Patient
description: An animal with excessively long fur that obstructed its vision and caused itchiness.

name: Uncle Steve
description: Another family member present at Nana's house.

name: Peacock
description: Residing within the loftiest tower of a hilltop castle, this majestic bird wizard is draped in a vibrant mantle of pink and yellow feathers that shimmer with arcane grace.

name: Tulu
description: Another bird friend mentioned by Izzy during the book reading.

name: Ant
description: A small insect that decides to come inside.

name: Miss Piggy
description: Rizzo's old friend who joins him on an adventure to investigate a gopher tunnel.

name: Bonner Sanassol
description: A name associated with the escaping mice and their adventures.

name: The Kiddos
description: A group of performers who sing and dance in colorful costumes and wings.

name: Elliot
description: A guest invited on board the spaceship who enters through the special door.

name: Cuwer
description: One of the thirty cats on the journey.

name: Rainbow Disco Unicorns
description: Pretend magical creatures featured in a song by Dingo-O.

name: Andrew
description: A family member who returns to the house during the reunion.

name: Katsumi
description: A distinguished scholar of the Ginger Catasorry and elite member of the academy’s talking cat crew, this feline has emerged from a long dormancy to join Kitty’s cat troop. Balancing studious discipline with silver-tongued eloquence, they bring the full weight of their feline intellect and the rare gift of speech to the unfolding journey.

name: Ben
description: A mouse known to the speakers.

name: Joey Giraffe
description: An employee at the amusement park who calls Mistress Mouse to fix a broken merry-go-round.

name: Peacock the Wizard
description: Once a deep-ocean companion to Seeker, this vibrant bird wizard now serves as the charismatic host of the magical castle’s grand show. From a cozy nest atop a soaring tower, they orchestrate wonder through balloon school arts—transmuting rubber into succulent strawberries—while proudly sporting a magnificent hat gifted by Hattie and Izzy. A playful visionary of dreamer magic and a tireless seeker of rare diamond-shaped potions, they use their stage to beckon heroes into a world of soaring imagination, often dispatching them on whimsical quests to recover enchanted new hats for their growing collection.

name: Crabby Robot
description: A robot crew member.

name: Nibbler
description: An elderly gopher who guards the tunnel entrance and has a healthy appetite for broccoli and tubers.

name: Astronauts
description: Space travelers who journey from Earth to the Moon.

name: Healo
description: A member of the Blind Mice family.

name: Seker
description: A kind wizard who lives in a castle and possesses various magical teleportation potions.

name: Olivia Mouse
description: A mouse whose car got stuck and needed a tow from Mistress Mouse.

name: Avis
description: A friend or relative who plays with the older toys Isabella keeps in her basement.

name: Mr. Hornet Turtle
description: An expert at fixing robots.

name: The Indigo Witch
description: A character in Hattie's painting who wears a violet hat.

name: Clam
description: A creature who joins the group and requests to be carried because it cannot swim.

name: Badasta
description: A sparkly bird friend who joins Hattie on her nighttime journey.

name: Timms
description: A mouse who lives and plays with Legos in the big house.

name: Finicky
description: A specific cat who spent an entire day puking throughout the house.

name: Baby Oscar Mouse
description: Haddy's baby sister who stays at the hospital and loves the baby lounge crackers.

name: Iza
description: A piece of moss who becomes Mossy's first friend on a sunlit rock.

name: Lily Mouse
description: Another mouse friend attending the Wizard's performance.

name: Surprise Mouse
description: A creative mouse inhabiting a sturdy fabric fortress, where they transform the brittle gold of autumn leaves into intricate art while navigating a life punctuated by sudden, marvelous surprises.

name: Mischief Rats
description: Naughty creatures residing in a basement who lost their unfreezing powers when a lion stole their tail-switches.

name: Jay
description: A cat student at Ginger Catasorry.

name: Alexander
description: A poised driver and student at Ginger Catasorry, this feline friend to Dimetar and Scratch Cat manages a digital Tamagotchi empire from the confines of a lunchbox. After recently representing Silver during the playdate, their steady paw was led far from the morning commute into the treacherous depths of the dark forest, where they navigated the shadows alongside Jane.

name: Captain Averybug
description: The pilot of the Mama Ship who meets the crew during their journey.

name: An Ant
description: A small creature encountered by the group beneath the mattress.

name: Sticker Gnome
description: A medium-sized purple decoration added to Hattie's latest hat.

name: Superhero Izzy
description: Isabella’s brave, caped alter-ego is a courageous guardian of the kaleidoscopic Rainbow Frasgle World. A soaring protector, she descends from the vibrant skies alongside a crew of talking cats to lend their whiskered wisdom and help Seeker restore order to the unfolding house chaos.

name: Habattaly
description: One of the many friends gathered at Hattie's house.

name: Pink Murgirl
description: The 'kiddo' mermaid who loves her backyard kelp forest.

name: June-June the Monkey
description: A playful monkey who tries to hide in a tree to avoid the camera.

name: Jane
description: Dimetar’s matronly childhood companion is a kindhearted cat and daring ship’s pilot, a friend to Finn, Isabella, and Scratch Cat who navigates the expedition toward Mouse Castle and the road to Cadasori. Her cockpit is a warm sanctuary distinguished by a "love you" sticker and a cabin teeming with whiskered passengers, reflecting the same tenderness she first offered Silver. Though she maintains a bold pace, she is easily swayed by snacks at Seeker’s house or waylaid within the tangled depths of the dark forest. An adventurous spirit with whimsical desires, she currently dreams of a special little hat adorned with rainbow feathers, glitter, and a miniature fishy pond to crown her nautical ensemble.

name: Jelly
description: A blue elephant who joins the other friends in learning how to chirp.

name: Julian
description: A loyal Martian local and trusted confidant to the crew, this indigo-colored elephant friend is adorned with shimmering stripes and a dusting of glitter. A steadfast source of support for Melly, they are frequently found navigating the crimson dunes of the red planet as a serene passenger aboard the whimsical playground trolley.

name: Floofty
description: One of Floofy's Floofer friends.

name: Gingercat
description: One of the cats that joins the adventure to Kibble World.

name: Dadda
description: Izzy's companion who visits the library with her and joins the deep-sea adventure.

name: Miceize the Jowse
description: A peculiar mouse featured in the expanding stories of Carland.

name: Zilliam the Robot
description: A robot who initially struggles with balance until he receives Lego upgrades.

name: Victor
description: Clad in blue shorts and a purple shirt, Lily’s brother is a tiny baby mouse and spirited cosmic stowaway who once served as a royal gardener within the Magic Forest’s glitter-shimmering houses. Now a rugged driver of a tow truck in the big car race, he balances his mechanical duties with a quest for a celestial watering can and the composition of percussive ‘bamp-bam-bum’ beats for space-faring worms. Though he treasures the sparkly art of Uncle Grisco and Haddy, his high-speed adventures often result in muddy messes that necessitate restorative baths, leaving him in singular pursuit of the perfect hat to complete his interstellar ensemble.

name: Fisco
description: The second Mischiefy Mole, who has the idea to use a light and hide toys under a chair.

name: Mr. Offises
description: A cat who speaks 'meow' language and repairs car seats.

name: Snake
description: Another neighbor in the community served by Hattie's hat boutique.

name: Marvin
description: A member of Mischief Mouse's family.

name: Disco (Mole 1)
description: A mischievous mole who enjoys digging and accidentally launches a space mission.

name: Christopher Robin
description: The master of the house at the final destination is a gentle boy and companion to Tigger, recently returned from a fishing trip to serve as the catalyst for the pilgrimage to the Wizard’s castle. Navigating the halls in a small car, he wanders the gallery of existence with a quiet, unsettling grace, pausing as a helpful friend to assist in inflating balloons. A reverent guest in his own domain, he visits Piglet—the foundational architect of a looming "big bad"—before setting the gears of the quest in motion and retiring home for a nap.

name: Midra Mouse
description: A member of Mistress Mouse's extended family.

name: Lemon Fish
description: Fish made of lemon that swim in the blueberry ocean.

name: Zoot
description: A puppet who delivers an orange trampoline to the Floofer Cloud as a gift.

name: Peter Rabbit
description: Every Sunday, Hattie’s Nana—a diligent bunny with a mechanical mind—arrives to spearhead ambitious backyard cleaning projects. Whether she is hauling brush or recalibrating a temperamental stove with her steady paws, her tireless spirit and technical handiness make her an indispensable force of domestic restoration.

name: Mr. Mischief Mole
description: A dedicated crew member reporting for duty on the mission.

name: Papa Mer-Girl
description: A mermaid parent who helps the girls brainstorm what kind of creature could eat a whole forest.

name: Uncle X the Owl
description: An owl living on Cornell Street who spends his time shoveling snow.

name: Baby Chipmunk
description: A small, hungry creature found at the playground who Hattie helps by providing a variety of apple snacks.

name: Pooki the Pig
description: A toy pig who joins Seeker on magical adventures.

name: Nansa
description: A member of Mischief Mouse's family with a beautiful name.

name: Hatty Mouse
description: A mouse whose job is to collect rocks from the surface of space.

name: Fiona
description: A friend of Izzy's from school.

name: Dr. Izzy
description: The dedicated physician at the animal hospital who treats Buddy, wielding a specialized blue earoscope with practiced precision to diagnose her patients.

name: Maggy the Mooker
description: A moose-like creature who lives on the Planet of the Mookers.

name: Prolam
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Anglerfish
description: A cantankerous lurker of the sunless depths, this creature guards his silence with a perpetual scowl, craving only the stillness of a long slumber. Yet, beneath his prickly veneer lies a well-meaning mischief-maker who frequently shatters the very quiet he seeks, playfully toppling artifacts with a flick of his fins before retreating back into his grumpy solitude.

name: Mr. Caro
description: One of the many names mentioned for the bird.

name: Whopper
description: A large construction digger who likes to dig and smooth out the road for others.

name: The Carvers
description: A team of expert artisans who create detailed stone art, including a carving of a cat on the library ceiling.

name: Ms. Clam
description: A resident of the deep sea who lost her pearl and cannot sleep without it.

name: Rosie
description: A little mouse who enjoys snacks and is known for biting off the heads of worms.

name: The Teacher
description: The educator at Dimetar's school who watches the children play and gets dizzy from the dragons' flying.

name: Bashy
description: An incredibly fast creature that is very difficult to catch.

name: Dada Mouse
description: The helpful father of Hattie and Avery.

name: Seeker's Mother
description: One of the guests attending the birthday celebration.

name: Pliggy Mouse
description: Tiggy's friend who receives a leaf and a rock as Christmas presents.

name: Hattie's Papa
description: Hattie the mouse's father who says goodnight at bedtime.

name: Pocket Shark
description: A tiny shark with pockets near his fins who can fit inside most people's pockets.

name: Frazzle
description: The cousin of Juliesta.

name: Toms
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Magic Ladder
description: A faithful, flying, and surprisingly smart ladder made of rope and wood.

name: Minnie Mouse
description: A gracious mouse and tireless caretaker who bridges the gap between her charming storefront, rugged construction sites, and the shimmering cosmos. Whether she is curating fine art supplies, clearing giant mud puddles as an expert digger driver, or piloting her vibrantly colorful rocket ship through the stars, she tends to her community with a unique blend of delicate charm, heavy-duty utility, and an explorer’s boundless spirit.

name: Manny
description: A member of Mischief Mouse's family.

name: The Squirrel
description: A hungry creature searching for nuts who receives a tip about a walnut tree from Disco.

name: Jessica
description: A mermaid explorer who travels in a submarine.

name: Spider
description: A bug trying to get nectar despite the rain.

name: Chicky
description: A steadfast mole friend who served as the group’s living anchor, keeping everyone united through the simple, vital act of holding hands; they have been spirited away to a distant planet and now await a rescue to restore the broken chain.

name: The Mystery Cozy Witch
description: The protagonist of Hattie's favorite bedtime book, who likes to get cozy on a rug with a bug.

name: Messer
description: Izzy's companion who brings a Christmas polishing kit for the ice castle.

name: Dollyums
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Bunsen
description: An obsessive chronometeorologist who views sleep as a luxury the world cannot afford, they spend their days and sunless nights tethered to a brass-bound "time wind tracker." With eyes bloodshot from perpetual vigilance, they monitor the shifting currents of temporal drafts, sacrificing rest to calibrate their instruments and fortify their laboratory against the encroaching gale of an impending storm.

name: Chief Engineer Isabella
description: The mission's lead engineer who manages the spaceship's systems and medical emergencies.

name: Fisca Kalo
description: A member of the Blind Mice family who welcomes the travelers.

name: Frasgle Dentist
description: A red Frasgle who helps remove the stuck blackberry seed.

name: Bird
description: High within the foliage, the creature’s rhythmic chirping signals a steady recovery from a sprained wing that once required clinical X-rays and a precise regimen of specialized pain medicine.

name: Chog
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Mama Kitten
description: Wobbly Whiskers’ mother, a figure of maternal persistence, scours the towering, silent stacks of the library on the planet of the Mookers in a tireless search for her lost kitten.

name: Cat Crew
description: Kitty’s loyal clowder of feline companions, an inseparable team of friends who serve as her resourceful and steadfast helpers.

name: Christmas Mouse
description: The conductor who manages passengers and leads jumping activities.

name: Yellow Murgirl
description: The 'dadda' mermaid and part of the murgirl family.

name: Muwer
description: One of the cats that explores Kibble World.

name: Stally
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Little Person
description: A small figure on the command deck who occasionally falls down.

name: Kelly
description: An elephant who participates in the grand chirping finale.

name: Mr. Slinger
description: A tiny resident of the Wizard’s tower’s dusty alcoves, this mouse has become a living gallery for Haddy’s craft, its humble nest and small frame now elegantly adorned with miniature masterpieces and vibrant, hand-crafted decorations.

name: Matchu Mouse
description: A member of Mistress Mouse's extended family.

name: Roberta
description: A skunk, also known as the pool noodle nibbler, who was eating foam because she was hungry.

name: The Starfish
description: A sea creature who guides the Rainbow Fish to the wise octopus.

name: Christmas Mice
description: Tall, big-shoed mice who live in the Mouse Castle and assist the group once woken by a Christmas song.

name: Ups-umps fish
description: One of the ten fishes in the aquarium.

name: Pam
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Sika
description: A small adventurer who lives in a house/castle and makes magical potions.

name: Potty the Mouse
description: A tiny mouse who takes his toy car to the sprinkle store for baking supplies.

name: Hatty the Mouse
description: A small mouse who loves to draw and is friends with Izzy the Kiddo.

name: Goldbug
description: A friend whose car breaks down on the side of the road with an engine problem and a missing wheel.

name: The Bird
description: A creature who claims the 'tweet song' belongs to birds alone.

name: Slingo Bingo Bunga Dinga
description: The stranded mole at the summit, also known as 'Dingo' for short.

name: Oscar the Robot
description: A character suggested for a story but ultimately rejected in favor of Hattie.

name: Playdough Mouse
description: A small, curious inhabitant of the desk area.

name: Bunsen Honeydew
description: A green scientist known as Honeydew who owns a science laboratory decorated with skeletons and chemical jars.

name: Elfie
description: One of Mistress Mouse's stuffy mice.

name: Disca
description: One of the characters visited by Papa Mole.

name: Frazgle
description: A growly relative of the Floofers who describes them as living pom-poms.

name: Bandit
description: Bluey's dad who joins the group for the party.

name: Captain Izzy
description: A determined space explorer and brilliant researcher, this confident commander leads her mission into the stars with absolute authority. A master pilot of both spacecraft and deep-sea submersibles, she navigates glittering heavens and crushing depths with unerring precision. Her tireless quest to collect alien artifacts remains fueled by a singular, inquisitive goal: finding playmates across the universe.

name: Rubber Ducky
description: A resident of the house who participates in the spring cleaning adventure.

name: Goober
description: A young kiddo gopher who likes playing games and eating broccoli.

name: Shamberine
description: A mouse who lost a special rainbow ball in the Arctic.

name: Garfield
description: Minnie and Mickey’s intrepid kitten is a seasoned morning commuter, navigating the school run to reach Seeker’s sanctuary for heavy napping and premium kibble. A social fixture known for sharing twilight dinners with Ginger or waiting expectantly at Nana’s for a warm welcome, they occasionally trade their public life for the quiet solitude of a closet, sequestering themselves away with a treasured hoard of toys.

name: Pransoms
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: New Baby
description: Hattie's new sibling at the hospital.

name: Giant Robot
description: A building-sized metal creation built by Hattie as a fun project.

name: Baby Austin
description: A small child with a sticker accompanying the group.

name: Victor the Mouse
description: A mouse searching for the perfect headwear, who becomes fond of blue hats decorated with elephant stamps.

name: Baby Raccoons
description: A family of ten small, nocturnal creatures who seek hats from Hattie.

name: Tot
description: A mouse friend who accompanies Uncle Bill and Seeker.

name: Queso
description: A dog friend invited to the birthday party feast.

name: Phillyfoo
description: A large, kind elephant who acts as the gate opener for Peacock's castle.

name: Muska Scaphor
description: A bright red tropical fish that was rescued from Seeker's beard after an underwater adventure.

name: Graw
description: An enormous white bird with great wings who lives in the Land of the Clouds.

name: Scratch Cat
description: A friendly cat visitor who knocks on Seeker's door and eventually stays for a sleepover.

name: Mercury
description: A small bear crew member who survived falling out of the rocket ship.

name: Gemstone
description: Popplemoll's cat who finds the starlight projections a bit too bright for his eyes.

name: Hammerhead Shark
description: A distinct shark encountered underwater who is friends with the Lanternsharks.

name: Mouse
description: An ice-skating enthusiast who sprained its tail and wears a tail warmer.

name: Cookie Monster
description: This azure beast of Sesame Street, driven by an eternal craving for cookies and perpetually swaddled in a plush blanket peppered with illustrations of his favorite treats, inadvertently snuffed out the constellations with a clumsy flick of a switch during a moonlit drive to a Lego assembly.

name: Nercury
description: A small bear crew member who required a band-aid and a kiss after an injury.

name: Red Mouse
description: The owner of a toy store made entirely out of wooden blocks.

name: Dizley
description: A duck drawn during a lesson who unexpectedly has teeth.

name: Squirrels
description: Forest animals who join the others to get their own hats.

name: Nina
description: One of the baby angler fishes.

name: Fisko
description: A mole character from a story told within the main narrative.

name: Dino
description: A dinosaur companion who sits on the storyteller's leg.

name: Secret Robot
description: A mysterious robot found hiding behind a tree in the forest.

name: Daisy
description: A tiny dog who is the guest of honor at her fifth birthday party.

name: Gatekeeper Elephant
description: The elephant who guards the doors to the Wizard's castle.

name: Miss Emily
description: A teacher at school mentioned by Izzy.

name: King of Balloon World
description: A giant rainbow balloon who rules Balloon World and wears an orange ring of balloons as a crown.

name: Silly-Silly
description: A playful friend mentioned as part of the gathering of artistic friends.

name: Haddy the Mouse
description: A master hat maker residing in a hollow tree, this creative mouse weaves shimmering masterpieces with a vibrant imagination and a nurturing heart. Whether she is brightening Izzy’s door with a heavy box of building blocks or tenderly watching over her baby sister, she moves with a grace that even a brief, surreal transformation into a mushroom could not dampen. A devoted friend and artisan, she remains a beacon of light, stitching care and sparkle into the world one whimsical creation at a time.

name: Mistress Mouse
description: A polite three-year-old mouse and resourceful shopkeeper, this community cornerstone balances a bold artistic spirit with sharp mechanical grit. Whether crafting intricate Lego creations in her sunroom or piloting her signature pink tow truck to solve puzzles and assist neighbors, she is a master of the road and a multi-talented creator. From famously adorning cars with blue stripes to dominating the race track, her inventive soul is always on the move. Usually seen in a mushroom-adorned cardboard hat with an orange sparkle purse, this resourceful driver remains an essential, evocative fixture of every neighborhood adventure.

name: Fishy-a
description: A bright pink fish that gets caught in Seeker's beard during an underwater adventure.

name: Bluey
description: A dog who is hosting a big birthday party for a friend.

name: Rum-some fish
description: One of the ten fishes in the aquarium.

name: Worm
description: A bug seen during the imaginary nature walk.

name: Buddy
description: A tiny, sick brown mouse found in the forest clearing.

name: Greenland Book
description: A sturdy sentient book from Book World that wears icy boots.

name: Wobbly Whiskers
description: A small white kitten, slick with the sticky, iridescent residue of the potion bottle she tumbled from, who joins the adventure in a desperate search for her lost mother.

name: Crab
description: A happy underwater creature who joins the expedition to the Deep-Deep Dark.

name: Grandpa Rick
description: A family member who greets the group upon their arrival at Nana's house.

name: Zozo
description: Seeker's mother, who is a fireman and drives a red car.

name: Betha Mouse
description: A member of Mistress Mouse's extended family.

name: Vigo
description: A member of the Blind Mice family.

name: The Count
description: A character mentioned as having a blanket decorated with numbers for counting.

name: Dimitar the Dragon
description: The hero of a great big book whose adventures are shared at bedtime.

name: Oscar
description: Hunkered in velvety shadows beside one of Mistress Mouse’s tattered stuffy mice, Lily’s brother illuminates a salvaged television with a scavenged flashlight, contentedly nibbling on oily debris. His focus drifts from the flickering screen to the miniature green car mired in a mud puddle—a casualty of the same reckless speed he employs when racing his yellow school bus. Between these high-stakes heats, he engineers sturdy Lego bridges that arch over the surrounding wreckage, all under the unblinking watch of his glass-eyed, plush sentinel.

name: Baby Bunny
description: A toy or character searched for at the end of the evening.

name: Mossy
description: A walking piece of moss that searches the forest for a damp home and a companion.

name: Bunson
description: A friend of Kitty who lives in a house the crew visits.

name: Jackie
description: A figure mentioned as the crew prepares new tools.

name: Uncle Bill
description: A diligent crew member and master Lego architect, this former visitor to Balloon World crafts perfectly symmetrical stairways and shapes iridescent purple slime into glistening rocket ships. Renowned for a sharp eye that once pierced Pluto’s crystalline shadows, they recently turned their gaze toward the forest’s depths, acting as a compassionate friend to discover and tend to a sick creature hidden in the brush. Whether providing blocks for builders, weaving bedtime stories, or offering woodland mercy, they remain a helpful soul. Yet, between these moments of structural precision and quiet rescue, they harbor a penchant for deep rest, often found napping peacefully inside the colorful confines of a toy container, tucked away amidst the playthings they share.

name: Frisky
description: A South American Marcella Moss who traveled a long way by airplane to find a new home.

name: Izzy
description: A focused and determined young girl who insists on completing her workout before starting her nightly routine.

name: Grover
description: A furry blue monster who is part of the crew traveling to Nana's.

name: Gorp
description: A cat traveler who journeys to Cat World and discovers his role in the story.

name: Dimitar
description: A sharp-witted resident of a circular island castle, this two-century-old purple dragonet carries a pirate’s salt-crusted legacy and a fierce devotion to his salvaged library. Formerly of the Cadasori galleries, Seeker’s grumpy companion now roams the deep to save his ancestral shores, though a recent volcanic disturbance has left him uncharacteristically sickened and frail. Driven by habit and a tireless appetite for fish, he bickers incessantly over snacks while guarding his remaining volumes with a brooding, protective intensity.

name: Little Bear
description: A character in the first book who plays hide and seek with his friends.

name: Monkeys
description: Inhabitants of the jungle who watch the race and cheer from the tree branches.

name: Gonk-a-Bona
description: An incredibly tall robot with many buttons that can walk, talk, sing, and transform into a lion.

name: Pixie
description: A nimble operative in Kitty’s elite superhero squad, this scholarly feline balances tactical missions and Ginger Catasorry studies with a profound appreciation for restorative slumber. Currently navigating a perilous underground expedition, the talking adventurer greets each waking moment with a signature "Hello, hello," shifting seamlessly from a quiet nap to the sharp-eyed focus required for subterranean survival.

name: Cavelber
description: A beautiful cat with a velvet belly.

name: Blackbelly Lanternshark
description: A species of shark with a glowing belly; one individual lost his light and became separated from his group.

name: Superhero Kitty
description: The brave leader of the cat crew who organizes the trip to visit the gophers.

name: Grampa Rick
description: Nana's husband who greets the arrivals at the house.

name: Monkey
description: A cheerful friend of Hattie who requests a portrait of himself to be drawn in markers.

name: Silver
description: Immortalized in the stone of the Great Library yet reborn in Cat World as a small, hungry kitten, Izzy is a brave companion who now traverses the heart of Limbo. Communicating through an ancient, rhythmic language of resonant purrs and wielding a masterfully handled magical can opener, this tiny spirit balances her arcane legacy with a newfound, desperately urgent need for snuggles.

name: Slickdorito
description: A character who assists Victor with his seatbelt for safety.

name: Drew
description: A person present at Nana's house to welcome the travelers.

name: Baby animals
description: The young creatures the moles visit during their trip to the zoo.

name: Finn
description: A resident of Cat World and loyal companion to Mama, Finncat is a meticulous research collector who documents the world through investigative sniffing. Alongside their peer Silver, they navigate their domain with scholarly curiosity, often pausing mid-voyage for a sudden, dramatic flop. While currently thwarted by the formidable challenge of an unopened food can, this diligent scholar occasionally graces the room for a fleeting minute during storytelling, lending a brief, discerning presence to the narrative before returning to their investigations.

name: Chester
description: A mouse of many suggestions who auditions a repertoire of sounds for his worm friend, now counted among the many figures awaiting a hat of his own.

name: Lion
description: A thief who stole the power switches from the tails of the mischief rats.

name: Cow
description: One of the friends who joins the group for breakfast.

name: Seagraid
description: A character who provides the moles with a magical return potion.

name: Fox's mom
description: One of the residents of Mischief Mouse's house.

name: Dragonets
description: Little dragons who live in villages on Dimitar's circular island.

name: The Ghost
description: A character in the game who claims toys and learns that everyone has their own way to share.

name: Clownfish
description: One of Hattie's friends who helps build a Lego aquarium.

name: The Patient
description: An individual suffering from a severe and persistent earache.

name: Baby Sister
description: Hattie's new sibling, whose arrival inspired Hattie to change her bedtime routine.

name: Kelp Bass
description: A green, finned fish living near Australia with a massive appetite for kelp.

name: Pisco
description: A map-making mole who lives at Hilltop Home.

name: Mission Control
description: The central base that communicates vital data and planet locations.

name: Farmer Wobble
description: A farmer with a comically absurd name who meticulously tends to his harvest of squerrets upon the geometric shores of Perfectly Square Island.

name: Simps
description: One of Minnie and Mickey's pet kittens.

name: Keesalastradronarasba bird
description: Also known as Lasra-bird; a giant, colorful tropical bird who loves eating ants and gives mountain rides.

name: Mookers
description: The blue, friendly inhabitants of a very slimy planet.

name: Nurse Daddy
description: The medical assistant who helps Dr. Izzy care for the mouse.

name: Mercy Mouse
description: A friend of Mischief Mouse who unwraps a special surprise present.

name: Disco
description: An energetic Mischief Mole and superhero-clad detective, Disco is one of two identical twins who embark on grand adventures through the deep. Alongside her sister Thisco, this architect of the subterranean maps hidden realms—from frozen frontiers to the dusty canyons beneath the furniture—by piloting her signature submarine or racing toy cars through the bedroom's wild heights. Guided by "Cornebyborn" dances and Papa Mole’s lore, she finds solace within her glowing basket house, a dream sanctuary and fortress of a hundred locks. Whether navigating grimy domestic landscapes or open waters, Disco balances mechanical ingenuity with a persistent, soft-hearted wonder for the night sky.

name: The Father
description: A character in the story who politely asks to join the baking session and helps finish the cookies.

name: Chove
description: The baby in Seeker's family who is known for chewing on things.

name: The Dragonettes
description: A group of small dragons who embark on adventures and enjoy eating fish and ice.

name: The Cats
description: Dust-mantled creatures who shed fine sediment across the floors for the harvesting moles, awaiting the arrival of indoor greenery cultivated through the long winter snowstorms.

name: Horse
description: A creature with pink and blue stripes wearing funny glasses.

name: Ernie
description: Bert’s classic companion and roommate moves through their shared world with the jittery stealth of a mouse, their impatient haste betraying them with a trail of unintended squeaks as they assist in the search for the lost pearl. Often found in a futile pursuit of order—whether frantically sweeping thick mud or overwhelmed by a cascade of forgotten toys—this iconic figure remains a soul perpetually caught between domestic chaos and a sudden drenching from a garden hose. Yet, on the long journey for the treasure, their nervous energy settles into a rhythmic wonder; they trade the mess of the earth for the fixed, silent patterns of the cosmos, weaving evocative stories of the stars to guide their path.

name: Wenden
description: A mouse made of slime that carries a chocolate cake.

name: Propsy
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Papale
description: A member of the Blind Mice family.

name: Shark
description: A mysterious creature encountered by Jessica in the deep sea.

name: Curlustava
description: Mrs. Piggy's sister, a pig Muppet who joins in the late-night visits.

name: Mr. Flossy
description: A specialist who fixes emotional computers.

name: Sophie's Mom
description: A helpful mouse who provides laboratory goggles for Sophie, Bunsen, and Beaker.

name: Tammy
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Wizard Bobizzard
description: Another wizard mentioned who is familiar with Siffle Papiffle's adventures.

name: Victor Mouse
description: A daring racer who pilots a vibrant yellow and blue bananamobile through the muddiest shortcuts, this mouse is fueled by a fastidious and singular ambition. Every victory brings him closer to fulfilling an incredibly long, exacting manifest of acquisitions, ranging from tailored velvet waistcoats to mahogany bureaus and gilded parlor trim.

name: Baby Angler Fishes
description: A group of young creatures needing rescue who ask the crew to build them a house.

name: Mrs. Strawberry
description: One of Hattie's friends who joins the morning walk.

name: Hootie the Owl
description: A large owl who helps the mice fly across the ocean.

name: Submarine Cat Robot
description: An amazing new kind of cat robot that lives underwater.

name: Zigga
description: A member of the Blind Mice family.

name: Captain
description: The pilot of the airplane who follows a specific flight plan to Cornell Street.

name: Floofy
description: A talking 'Floofer' creature who serves as a hat for Graw the bird.

name: Pickles Pig
description: One of the pig sisters who builds a tall Lego tower and eventually knocks it down.

name: The Duck
description: A magical creation with extremely long legs that can waddle at high speeds.

name: Animal
description: A vibrant creature of rhythm dwelling within the ship’s hull, this Muppet drummer is defined by a wild shock of bright red hair and the swirling folds of his favored blue cloaks. As he keeps time for the voyage, the crew treats him as a cherished fixture, regularly presenting him with a special, potent elixir crafted specifically to sate his eccentric palate.

name: Ro-lee-pops fish
description: One of the ten fishes in the aquarium.

name: Ice Dragons
description: A community of dragons who gather annually for a special festival.

name: Rainbow Frasgle
description: A resident of Rainbow Frasgle World who greets Orange Frasgle.

name: Robot Mommy
description: A mechanical parent figure who sings instructions about how to share.

name: Elsa Pony
description: A pony with ice powers who loves freezing things.

name: Mommy
description: A dog guest who comes to celebrate Daisy's birthday.

name: Monch
description: A friendly, person-sized lizard folk creature with green scales, yellow eyes, and a long sticky tongue who enjoys tea and meditation.

name: Ziggety Ziggety Zack
description: A specific, highly energetic Floofer who loves to bounce but struggles with exhaustion.

name: JJ Mouse
description: A helpful mouse nurse who assists Dr. Lily at the local clinic.

name: Fox
description: Behind a ceremonial mask and a playful sticker, this solitary navigator charts both the stars and the thicket, serving as a forest inhabitant who provides directions in exchange for a breakfast of flowers and juice. A steadfast ritualist and fire-extinguisher, they toll the iconic bell for the nibbler while finding more solace in space tacos than the decadent elixirs brewed in their honor. Whether navigating the heavy void or the woodland path, they remain a wise neighbor of cosmic perspective, pointedly advising seekers that the path to clarity begins with a simple bath. Bound to the chime that draws the visitor, they are a figure of quiet contrast—a guide who understands that the weight of destiny is best balanced by the essential purities of the everyday.

name: Mama
description: Pistis Mouse’s mother, the architect of the naming that defined her daughter, is a maternal mole who slips away to the store by day and is currently away at the hospital. She remains the quiet destination at the journey’s end: a presence anchored to an upstairs chair, waiting to beckon her kitten into the velvet warmth of her lap for a soft, lingering embrace.

name: Second Disco
description: Another mole character named Disco who assists in digging and sweeping.

name: Seeker
description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

name: Bumpfish
description: One of the ten fishes in the aquarium.

name: Jom
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Teacher
description: A figure found lingering in the dim recesses of the toy store, acting as the quiet custodian who provides the group with the loan of a heavy, brass school bell.

name: Mama Mole
description: A mindful member of the mole family who guides Disco on contemplative nature walks along the sidewalk’s edge, illuminating their path with a steadying headlamp. Pairing firm yet nurturing instructions with vital maintenance exercises to ensure the robot’s long-term mechanical well-being, they eventually retreat from the outdoors to join the communal deep sleep in the new living room.

name: Dit Darnet
description: A character who speaks 'nyerber-nyerber' and helps fix a marble run.

name: The Octopus
description: A wise sea creature who advises the Rainbow Fish on how to find happiness.

name: Angler
description: A giant fish seen at the Odic Aquarium.

name: Other Mouse
description: A spirited mouse racer who navigates grueling long-distance courses through tangled jungles and exotic zoos with a carefree heart. Unburdened by any worldly troubles, he finds bliss in the adrenaline of the track and the quiet precision of building with Legos, living a life of seamless, architectural joy.

name: Hattie
description: A clever mouse milliner and engineer of whimsy, she is a resourceful spirit who crafts exquisite hats and soulful portraits within her hollow tree stump workshop. Though a formidable presence famously counted among the thirty legendary cats, she is currently confined to her bed by illness, her usual treks through saturated woodlands for rare tape and lollipops temporarily halted. Even in her malaise, her sharp mind lingers on a recent, stinging disagreement with Dimitar over a fish, a rare shadow cast upon a heart otherwise known for its boundless generosity and creative light.

name: Disco (Mole 2)
description: The second mole who joins the intergalactic voyage.

name: Tiggy the Mouse
description: A mouse with a red crystal flashlight who enjoys giving gifts on Christmas.

name: Dada
description: Pistis Mouse's father who goes on shopping errands.

name: Nestor
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Dinosaur
description: A paper-crafted animal that resembles a red snowflake.

name: Up-peit-y fish
description: One of the ten fishes in the aquarium.

name: Baby James
description: A new baby mouse mentioned in the story who stays at home.

name: Carnabee Shark
description: A unique type of shark described as friendly, mean, slow, luxury, and chompy.

name: Tomcat
description: A cat who is part of the large group that overruns Seeker's house.

name: The Balloon Teacher
description: The instructor at the balloon school who teaches students how to twist balloons into sculptures.

name: Figaro
description: A sharp-witted scholar of the Ginger Catasorry, this feline hero balances rigorous academic discipline with the street-wise loyalty of Kitty’s superhero troop. Driven by a restless spirit, they are the first to slip into the night in search of adventure, prowling for action while the rest of the crew sleeps.

name: Jiggy
description: A mouse who goes on an island adventure to climb a mountain.

name: Fingo
description: A diligent mole scuba diver who maintains the iridescent rainbow fish habitat, now surfacing from his chores to join another dog guest in a boisterous chorus of friends singing "Happy Birthday" to the sea life.

name: Goofy
description: A gopher with big teeth who lives in a decorated underground tunnel in Australia.

name: Zudy Dragon
description: A red and green dragonet from Strawberry Island who meets Dimetar on the playground.

name: Kanga
description: A motherly resident of the Hundred Acre Wood.

name: Space Rock
description: A giant, sentient floating rock in space with eyes and a mouth.

name: Melly
description: An orange elephant who goes on a quest to find her voice after being told elephants can't chirp.

name: Oscar the Grouch
description: A green friend who joins the group for the long journey.

name: Woodchuck
description: A fat creature looking for vegetables to eat.

name: Papa Mole
description: The wise leader and industrious architect of the Mischief Moles, this polite elder visionary guides his kin from the attic’s shadowed heights toward the stars and across biting, crystalline ice. A master pathfinder who initiated their voyage upon unearthing an ancient tome, he balances the weight of celestial navigation with the tactile craft of carving a new tunnel home and the thoughtful devotion of planning whimsical days of activities for his children. Whether introducing surprise robots for play, anchoring meditations during a frozen trek, or sleep-sitting in his favorite chair, his tactical brilliance ensures their furthest discoveries remain rooted in the rhythmic, quiet peace of a sanctuary built by his own seasoned hands.

name: Mickey Mouse
description: Minnie’s musical companion and star-bound co-pilot is an industrious toy mouse who returns from school to mend the broken and fill the silence of the void with song. While he remains Izzy’s imagined confidant—a silent listener to her whispered anxieties regarding dwindling supplies—he also finds joy in companionship, proudly showcasing his intricate Lego creations to a trusted friend amidst the stars.

name: Talking Broccoli
description: A surprising vegetable found in the refrigerator who talks but doesn't want to be eaten, preferring to join the group for a pear dinner.

name: The Cat Crew
description: Kitty the Superhero's group of feline companions who assist in her adventures.

name: Mayor of Dragonet Town
description: The leader of Dimitar's jungle town who tasks him with finding ice.

name: Mom
description: Kitty’s mother, first seen sharing a quiet midday meal with her daughter, anchors Izzy’s world with a gift of celestial wonder: a special lamp that transforms the darkness into a swirling projection of stars.

name: The Mookers
description: Hailing from a neighboring planet, these toe-sized spheres of dense fur bear the uncanny features of miniature moose. They communicate through a rhythmic chorus of "mooks" and are defined by a singular, voracious obsession with sandwiches.

name: Blue Murgirl
description: The 'mamma' mermaid who opens the door for the visitor.

name: Dr. Boozen
description: Izzy's doctor who gave her an old map.

name: Jasper
description: A mouse friend who joins the group to watch the show.

name: Juliesta
description: A yellow-furred cousin of Frazzle who is nervous about an upcoming performance.

name: Pout-Pout
description: A fish friend of Willa, Bert, and Ernie.

name: Riggy
description: A man who accompanies Jiggy the mouse on an island adventure.

name: Mama Frasgle
description: The mother of Orange Frasgle who accompanies him to the dentist.

name: Purpy
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Mole
description: A resourceful, perpetually humming mole with an impossibly long name, this polite and intrepid mariner serves as a bridge between worlds, translating Frasgle’s unique tongue and guiding the way to the hidden Underground Library. Whether managing rocket controls with wide-eyed curiosity, unraveling treehouse mysteries, or sharing the magic of special Legos, he encourages his companions to embrace the unknown between tending his dandelion yard and baking fragrant banana bread. A lover of both wriggly worms and sweet blueberries, he sings whimsical songs of carnabee sharks and drives a noisy dark brown car, remaining firmly hesitant about boarding giant robots even as he coaxes his friends toward bold new adventures.

name: Mouse Friends
description: A group of teeny tiny mouse toys that join Potty the Mouse on his adventures.

name: Bat-down-ey-umps fish
description: One of the ten fishes in the aquarium.

name: Mogarana
description: A Mooker who accidentally threw a ball onto the Sun.

name: Sas-ma-ras-ma-fla-mas-frog-in-dine frog
description: A rare species of frog that lives exclusively at the tippy-tippy-top of mountains.

name: Snelly
description: A bright red elephant who joins the chirping group at the end of the story.

name: Baby Jane
description: A kitten who is struggling to adjust to her new school.

name: Fincat's Mouse
description: The loyal companion to Izzy the Kiddo who joins the journey to find the wizard's hat.

name: Sansango Cantasa
description: An intrepid deep-sea explorer who dives into the high-pressure depths.

name: Zanna
description: A character who sets out to find a bouncy mence.

name: Mama Mouse
description: The devoted matriarch of the Blind Mice family and watchful guardian of the household, she balances the sweet lilt of nightly lullabies with the adrenaline of a seasoned racer. Behind the wheel of her medium-sized black car—carrying a well-thumbed book on the secrets of junk—she guards Hattie and Avery’s peace as fiercely as she commands the asphalt.

name: Jinjar
description: Also known as the Balloon Popper, she is a kitten who got lost in Slime World.

name: Pakarito
description: A friendly chipmunk neighbor who owns an extensive collection of various nuts.

name: Bat-down-ey fish
description: One of the ten fishes in the aquarium.

name: Uncle Grisco
description: A nomadic mole scientist and science teacher, this subterranean inventor resides in a home brimming with wondrous experiments, serving as a devoted confidant to the gopher folk. Within his laboratory of glowing elixirs and prismatic shadows, he fuses volcanic lore with the study of light to translate the planet's restless movements and the scarred history of cosmic craters. A wandering sage who maps both deep tectonic veins and celestial paths, he frequently emerges from his sprawling tunnels to share ancient botanical secrets and astronomical insights with his friend Seeker.

name: Silvercat
description: A seafaring resident of Kibble World, this feline explorer bridges the gap between the sun-drenched feasts of her homeland and the crushing silence of the abyss. Known for her hospitality, she invites visitors to partake in an overflowing bounty of kibble before leading her deep ocean exploration mission into the uncharted mysteries of the sea floor.

name: Flame Bird
description: A magical creature made of fire that guides the moles after the volcano erupts.

name: Zonner Zenzy
description: A character dwelling within the strange narratives of the deep.

name: Rainbow Giraffe Stuffie
description: A magical stuffed animal with a long neck, rainbow fur, and wings that allow it to fly.

name: Sophie's Dad
description: An architect who designed the Eat and Greet Bakery.

name: Finn Space Cat
description: A feline space traveler with a broken alarm clock.

name: Kid Moles
description: The group name for Papa Mole's children, Disco and Disco.

name: Lisca
description: One of the many mice friends living in the big house.

name: Googoo
description: A bird who searches for missing stories.

name: Lottie
description: A member of the crew who takes over as the driver and spies mysterious things out the window.

name: Thistle
description: A spirited mole child navigating the biting winds and frosted peaks, one of the small, adventurous souls braving the treacherous snowy climb.

name: Dadda Mole
description: A mole found under the bed searching for a snack of crumbs and worms.

name: Ping
description: The baby sister in the Blind Mice family.

name: Tolly
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Sisco
description: The other listener getting ready for bed with Disco.

name: Rizzo the Rat
description: A friendly rat who enjoys nature walks, collecting rocks, and exploring the outdoors.

name: Haddy
description: A hardworking mouse who owns a workshop and goes on magical quests.

name: Eea
description: A member of the Blind Mice family.

name: Mischief
description: Proprietor of the analog-scented tape store on the corner of Poplar and Popcornioni, this avian known as Velociraptorning is Hattie’s loyal companion and the devoted mother of Mistress Mouse. Whether aiding Oscar on his adventures from their shared burrow or tending her wall of magnetic spools, she remains a soul of simple pleasures—sketching in sun-drenched parks, sharing meals of corn, and admiring her daughter’s new hat with a prideful, artistic eye.

name: Snooper-ka-floopers
description: Fuzzy ball creatures in Slime World who are related to the Floofers.

name: Tiny worm
description: A very small creature for whom the moles dig a tiny, custom tunnel.

name: Nana's Bunny
description: A stuffed toy present during the storytelling.

name: Sour-ish fish
description: One of the ten fishes in the aquarium.

name: Tringo
description: A dog who arrives at the house to celebrate with Daisy.

name: Sneeter
description: A blue and green alien resident of Slime World with only legs and a tail.

name: Honna Fisibizle
description: A rhythmic character mentioned in tales of the sea mice.

name: Wilson
description: One of the group of mice living in the shared home.

name: Goober Gopher
description: A friendly gopher who lives in a deep underground tunnel and loves speed nibbling tubers.

name: Gagok
description: A magical paper bird and loyal companion to Seeker, this enchanted creature requires the essence of a specialized crystal to take wing and navigate the skies.

name: Piglet
description: A diminutive and loyal companion, this small, thoughtful creature balances high-spirited play with Christopher Robin against a dedicated role in the group’s collaborative drawing sessions. Ever-attentive and earnest, he now channels his quiet focus into a heartfelt quest: discovering the perfect birthday gift for a cherished friend.

name: Izzy the kiddo
description: The brave young protagonist who emerged from the earthen depths alongside the moles to aid Hattie, Isabella remains a steadfast visitor whose melodic songs of courage bolster her friends.

name: Ove
description: A wise old mole and magic teacher who instructs students on how to use rhyming spells to manipulate objects.

name: Nana Mole
description: Mole's grandmother who owns a bag of magical Legos and lives by a field of flowers.

name: Zigzag
description: A small robot with big eyes and short legs who tries to learn human activities and dances.

name: Super Kitten
description: A heroic feline who speaks in meows and proposes building a sustainable kelp farm.

name: Mama Bear
description: The colossal mother bear discovered at the first story’s conclusion, a well-meaning giant whose accidental grazing once laid waste to the murgirls' vibrant kelp forest.

name: Blue Mergirl
description: One of the Mergirls living in a cave on the sea floor.

name: Workout Wombats
description: A group of adventurous animals who don funny clothing to prepare for their missions.

name: Emily
description: A steady-handed passenger on the playground trolley, this loyal companion bears the faint, tacky traces of adhesive on their fingertips—a testament to the patience required to painstakingly mend a shattered sculpture and restore beauty from its broken shards.

name: Floofy the Floofer
description: A bouncy creature who visits the Mookers.

name: Kenzi
description: A crew member who is already suited up and ready for the space flight.

name: Bolly
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Cindy-Wan the Frog-a-loza
description: A tiny green and red frog that lives in the jungle and leads the way to water.

name: Eeyore
description: A somber donkey and companion to Tigger and Christopher Robin within the castle walls, he celebrates his birthday under a trademark cloud of gloom, certain that his friends have arrived empty-handed and forgotten his special day.

name: Pooky
description: A pig stuffie who sits in Dad's lap during the story.

name: Tina
description: A sibling of Nina and one of the baby angler fishes.

name: Mama Pooky
description: Spooky Pooky's mother who fixes furniture and wears the handmade jewelry her son creates.

name: The Millipede
description: A resident of the Land of the Clouds who directs Haddy and Seeker toward the thunder cloud.

name: Mama Mer-Girl
description: A mermaid parent who worries about the safety of her own kelp forest.

name: Pringo
description: A canine friend invited to the birthday celebration.

name: Leo Lion
description: A character suggested as a stand-in for Silver the kitten.

name: Helly
description: One of the many elephant friends who eventually finds their chirp.

name: Mark
description: A mouse from another mouse family group.

name: Finley Fawn
description: The mermaid persona adopted by Izzy at the beginning of the story.

name: Jickity Jickity Giraffe
description: A very tall giraffe who drives a high-speed race car.

name: Hand Creature
description: The brave captain of the space mission.

name: Plo-Plorum
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Winnie-the-Pooh
description: A bear friend also known as Pooh-bear who joins the drawing session.

name: Pink Mergirl
description: A compassionate spirit of the deep, she serves as a beacon for sharks denied a natural glow, illuminating their path through the abyss before retreating to her grotto to find cozy comfort in the embrace of a plush seal stuffy.

name: Llama
description: A specialized member of the space exploration crew, tasked with hauling interstellar freight through the airlocks and maintaining the team’s morale by managing and serving the vessel's supply of snacks and provisions.

name: Row
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Pink Mer-Girl
description: Rainbow Mer-Girl's friend who joins the search for the kelp thief.

name: Magic Mole Stuffie
description: A stuffed mole who has just moved into a new apartment featuring a piano and unique furniture.

name: Hattie the mouse
description: A sociable companion to Mickey and Minnie, this mouse finds joy in gathering friends over hearty pots of homemade stew or setting off on spirited explorations, such as her recent journey through the shimmering wonders of a deep-sea aquarium.

name: Chickadee
description: A small bird that visits the mole hole for a breakfast of twigs and worms.

name: Vroom-Vroom
description: A lightning-fast bird who tries to fly past the camera but gets caught anyway.

name: Popomal
description: A visitor who arrives at the door to introduce a hungry kitten to the house.

name: Crabby
description: A neighbor who helps identify the mysterious footprints in the yard.

name: Elephant
description: A colossal, trumpeting behemoth crowned with a vibrant blossom, haunting the misty threshold where salt-sprayed jungles meet turbulent, stormy seas. It remains a stoic, floral-crested sentinel, unmoved as the high-octane shriek of race cars blurs through its ancient, verdant domain.

name: Lily Mousey
description: A kind mouse doctor who helps heal injuries in the mouse community.

name: Holly
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Hand-Creature
description: A unique member of the space crew.

name: The Rainbow Fish
description: A beautiful fish with shimmering scales who learns the joy of sharing.

name: Mom Mouse
description: Surprise Mouse's mother who provides assistance with difficult leaf art.

name: Audia
description: A character from a dream whom Izzy used to play with frequently.

name: Spooky Pooky
description: A creative and kind pig who enjoys reading and making gifts for his family and friends.

name: Princess of Mouseland
description: Adorned in a shimmering, star-dusted gown and a crown of deep sapphire, this royal mouse governs her miniature kingdom by bestowing ceremonial names upon every wheel of artisanal cheese. Beneath her whimsical duties lies a legacy of enchantment, as she is the sovereign owner of the magical vessel currently ferrying the adventurers across the realms.

name: Ma Pig
description: The mother of the pig family whose car gets stuck in the mud.

name: Space Cat
description: A mysterious creature heard scratching against space rocks outside the vessel.

name: Data Mouse
description: A mouse racer who drives an orange carrot car and participates in the big construction site race.

name: Izzy's Mom
description: A character in the story who helps the students mix their slime.

name: Zoe
description: A character with scientific knowledge about melting ice using salt.

name: Officer Mouse
description: A character capable of reading secret messages from other planets.

name: Reata
description: One of the residents of Mischief Mouse's house.

name: Penny Pig
description: One of the pig sisters who builds a tall Lego tower for Mistress Mouse.

name: Baby Mole
description: The youngest mole, once carried by kin through a grueling mountain ascent to unearth a shimmering artifact of ancient magic, survived the world-scorching fires of a volcanic eruption by sheltering deep within the sanctuary of the burrow.

name: Orange Frasgle
description: A creature with many sharp teeth who gets a seed stuck in his mouth.

name: Dada Robot
description: The baby robot's father who is happy to see his child return home.

name: Caribbean Amphibians
description: Creatures that live in a special house within the deep sea.

name: Alfie
description: Lily’s brother, a bold infant residing in the hospital, has entered the big race behind the wheel of a heavy-duty pink tow truck. Having recently survived a thick, muddy pile-up alongside Oscar that sidelined his mouse companion’s miniature brown car, the baby now maneuvers his vibrant new rig through the ward with a champion's intent.

name: Floofo
description: One of Floofy's Floofer friends.

name: Ova
description: A mouse character who is celebrating her fifth birthday with a dance party and cake.

name: Pumpkin
description: A student of Ginger Catasorry and veteran of Kitty the Superhero’s specialized troop, this feline translates the tactical intuition of dark gopher tunnels into rigorous academic study. Despite their combat experience, they harbor a paralyzing fear of being eaten by their subterranean foes—initially trembling at the mere sight of the big gopher—a dread that frequently sends the scholar scurrying to hide between Izzy’s legs for sanctuary.

name: Ginger
description: A soft, round, and silver-coated feline, this exceptionally fluffy educator is one of Minnie and Mickey’s own kittens grown into a figure of quiet authority. Known for daintily distributing napkins with velvet paws and commuting to school behind the wheel, the gray-furred teacher balances his role on Nana’s welcoming committee with a life of polite, helpful service. Whether presiding over his humble sanctuary—the very cage Seeker once coveted—or sustaining himself on crunchy kibble and savory wet food, he remains a steady presence, most recently seen trading his classroom duties for the shadows of a secret closet hideout alongside Garfield.

name: Mr. Swinger
description: A customer who calls Hattie to order a custom-painted purple and green cardboard hat.

name: Zingo
description: A bear friend of the moles who hibernates in their largest tunnel.

name: Tia Mouse
description: A friendly mouse who manages the front desk at the doctor's office on Mouse Street.

name: Beaker
description: A high-strung Muppet and devoted companion to Bunsen, this jittery assistant—and close friend to Kitty—communicates solely through a frantic cadence of staccato "meeps" and "me-me" sounds. Driven by a nervous obsession with their work, they share a home with the scientist, remaining perpetually wide-eyed and sleepless until the day’s experiments reach a successful conclusion, pausing only for the occasional, coveted treat from the local bakery.

name: Balloon Spider
description: A balloon creation twisted by Squeaky.

name: Mia Mayhem
description: A superhero friend of Isabella.

name: Darby
description: One of the Super Sleuths who arrives on a scooter to solve problems.

name: Baby sister
description: Kitty's young sister who is part of the superhero family.

name: Gravity Goldfish
description: Once a soaring engine of atmospheric ruin that leveled metropolises, this sky-bound terror was transformed by a single Valentine into a silent, mended guardian. Now celebrated in song as a legendary "pretend fish," the reformed creature drifts peacefully through the clouds, keeping a gentle, protective watch over the world and its companion, Mini Mango.

name: Scorpion
description: A creature that dwells within the mysterious blue depths.

name: Afiska
description: A person preparing for a long journey to a cold and rainy place who needs a talking hat for company.

name: The mouse in the painting
description: A tiny mouse that Hattie adds to complete her artwork.

name: Danet the Koala
description: A koala with a computer jumbled up in emotions.

name: Peewee
description: A potential name briefly considered for one of the visiting cats.

name: Dolly
description: One of the orange traffic cones who participates in the stacking game.

name: Baby Foxes
description: Small foxes who join the group seeking hats to keep warm.

name: Little Bird
description: A diminutive, felt-feathered avian from the world of Sesame Street who wedges himself into the car for every adventure, sustaining his whimsical frame on a breakfast of exactly one grain of salt.

name: Jame
description: Hattie's friend who requests a little orange hat decorated with sparkly mouse stickers.

name: Ttia
description: The person the crew plans to visit after the space mission concludes.

name: Papa
description: A fixture of Izzy’s household and a steadfast confidant, this family member possesses a mender’s spirit, recently evidenced by the meticulous patience they used to glue a shattered art kit back together.

name: Rainbow Mergirl
description: A resourceful mergirl known for her clever use of kelp to aid the Lanternshark, she balances her practical ingenuity with a spirited streak, recently exemplified by a sharp disagreement with the Pink Mergirl over their cherished stuffed animals.

name: Izzy the Kiddo
description: Once a quiet dreamer sketching from a recovery bed, this brave explorer now leads her companions through Hattie’s workshop and the lightless abyss, guided by a beacon of special light. Clad in a rugged driving suit alongside Bluey and Fincat’s Mouse, she wields heavy hammers and a magic wand with logistical precision inherited from her Nana. From trading plastic bricks for rare mushrooms to orchestrating neighborhood cleanups, she balances specialized gear with a playful spirit. Choosing the spark of a game over the gravity of a traditional quest, she ensures her radiant creativity and guiding light remain her most powerful tools for navigating the unknown.

name: The Three Blind Mice
description: A group of tiny adventurers who accompany Papa Mole on the expedition.

name: Bearhead
description: Awakened from an eon of glacial slumber, the Ice King is a massive bear with a disproportionately large head crowned in frost. Though he rules a kingdom of frozen silence, he is a master of rhymes and rhythmic riddles, emerging from his lethargy to traverse the snows and deliver heartfelt Valentine’s surprises with a whimsy that defies his biting winter chill.

name: The Fish
description: The subject of a rhyming poem who swims in a dish and goes on a quest for honey.

name: The Big Fluffy Bunny
description: The fluffy guardian of the Mountain of Crystal Magic.

name: Dimitar's mother
description: Dimitar's mother who flies him to school.

name: Sloth
description: A sleeping animal depicted in a surprise coloring book.

name: Seamouse
description: A nautical rodent and the subject of several books, occasionally seen wearing a hat.

name: The Mischief Moles
description: A troupe of adventurous little moles who attended Flutter’s birthday party in sturdy galoshes, fresh from exploring the forest’s hidden trails and mossy hollows.

name: Hoodie the Mouse
description: A different mouse with a large appetite for Italian cuisine and a talent for building cozy nests.

name: Santa Claus
description: A character from another story who fell down while delivering presents.

name: Squeaky the Doggo
description: A purple shiny balloon dog who works at the Balloon Twisting School.

name: Older boys
description: A group of boys traveling through space in a ship with Mischief Mouse.

name: Mrs. Swinger
description: A character mentioned as someone who might need a new hat.

name: Don-Don the Elephant
description: An enthusiastic elephant who loves posing for action shots and dancing.

name: The Penguin
description: A character or entity added to the game during the 'penguin step'.

name: Old Cat
description: The vigilant and protective guard who owns the rooftop garden and demands visitors be careful with his plants.

name: Minnie
description: A wise veteran of briny depths and interstellar frontiers, Mickey’s resourceful mouse companion and confidant to the Princess of Mouseland guides Izzy and Hattie with a glowing lantern and ingenious Mystery Mousketools. Having recently breathed life into a towering guardian of interlocking bricks, this intrepid traveler now points the way toward the mountain’s peak, pausing to investigate the savory aroma of bacon-scented mushrooms while serving as a compassionate friend whose seasoned instincts help decipher Frasgle’s complex roars and sounds.

name: Whale Shark
description: A very large and friendly shark who welcomes Seeker and Dimitar to the Deep Deep Dark.

name: Sanina
description: Dimetar's soft, purple cat stuffie used for nap time.

name: Moll
description: A mole who joins Mickey and Minnie on their night walk.

name: Cats
description: Felines that are unexpectedly puking in various locations.

name: Siffle Papiffle
description: A small, red floofer who can bounce incredibly high and lives on the Floofer Cloud.

name: The Kitten
description: A tiny, ravenous resident of Balloon World, this playful kitten is infamously known as the "Sneaky Popper." Between bouts of accidental sabotage, the hungry feline visits the house, trading their mischievous reputation for a warm bowl of food and a soft touch of affection.

name: Murmur Mouse
description: A member of the Blind Mice family.

name: Willa
description: The 'worry-worry whale' who lives in the ocean.

name: Tiny Fuzzballs
description: Aliens from a distant planet who need a ride to their new school on Earth.

name: Jetmans
description: A mouse resident of the large mouse house.

name: Robot
description: A visitor to Hattie's workshop who is initially looking for a hat but decides he wants a picture instead.

name: Luba
description: Goober's sister gopher who shares his love for garden carrots.

name: Grape Cat
description: A friendly resident of Rainbow Fruit World entirely made of grapes.

name: Hattie's Mama
description: Hattie the mouse's mother who says goodnight to her.

name: Prolly
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Other mice
description: A group of mouse friends who join Ova's continent-themed dance party.

name: Zo
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Elliot the Elephant
description: An elephant who lost his precious gemstones.

name: Dada Space Rock
description: Moueks' father, who is rescued from floating in deep space.

name: Silver Cat
description: A cat who receives a medium-sized, sparkly silver cardboard hat from Hattie.

name: Trips
description: One of the ten fishes in the aquarium.

name: Mama Space Rock
description: A member of the space rock family residing on the Rainbow Planet.

name: Carland
description: A mysterious figure from a book who is said to be coming and is known to be smooth.

name: Robot Camera
description: A specialized device tasked with watching over the crew to ensure their safety.

name: Queso Dog
description: The ship's official translator who can understand the language of space fuzzballs.

name: Snisko
description: A mole character from a story told within the main narrative.

name: Kitty
description: Isabella’s loyal companion and a valiant superhero, this feline-costumed commander harnesses agile, cat-like powers to lead an intrepid crew through the drifting wonders of Balloon World. Bound by a mission of guardianship, she navigates the whimsical floating realm on daring adventures, rescuing lost treasures and protecting every creature she encounters.

name: Icicle
description: A titanic and ancient white ice dragon, this towering companion to Dimitar commands the skies with freezing breath and vast, powerful wings. From a shimmering ice palace atop a remote mountain peak, he presides over his crystalline domain with a timeless and frigid majesty, sustained exclusively by a diet of frozen fish.

name: Winston
description: Sophie's brother, a mouse who gets trapped under the snow while making a snow angel.

name: Miss Lamb
description: A teacher at Montessori School whom the moles consider contacting for help.

name: Nana
description: The dignified mole matriarch and grandmother to Hattie, Pistis, and Isabella, this pillar of watchful wisdom resides at the end of the train line, tackling life’s problems "one at a time." From engineering mouse-scale Lego structures to the meticulous restoration of dollhouses using patient glue and tiny pencils, her steady paws bridge the gap between architectural feats and delicate artistry. Whether discerning potential as a trolley passenger or welcoming weary travelers into her sanctuary, her quiet authority is so legendary that she graces the cover of Hattie’s book in a rare, peaceful slumber. Even in rest, she remains the heart of their world—a steady warmth anchoring every journey’s end, her sharp eyes softening for Izzy’s mushroom-textured crafts.

name: Mama Bird
description: A rainbow-colored bird who is the mother of the giraffe stuffie.

name: Ava
description: Isabella's little sister who comes along for school pickup.

name: Cookie Cutter Shark
description: A shark with a round mouth that takes circular bites and considers the Whale Shark a friend.

name: Dimatar's Mom
description: The dragonet's mother who arrives at the end of the day to pick him up.

name: Crystal Mountain Caretaker
description: A mysterious companion and frequent subject of Seeker’s sketches, this enigmatic friend often arrives in the quiet company of Hattie the Mouse.

name: Visco
description: A mole detective and partner to Disco.

name: Jollie
