description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Squirrel
description: A fuzzy gray creature with a voluminous, silver tail, once only a phantom heard crunching on neighborhood acorns, now reveals itself as it forages for nuts with jittery grace.

name: Zinna
description: A giraffe who gives tours of the castle's feast hall, kitchen, and fireplace.

name: Librarian Mooker
description: A scholarly Mooker resident of the planetary library who serves as an indispensable guide for the heroes, providing the vital intelligence needed to track Mama Kitten’s whereabouts among the labyrinthine stacks.

name: Cod the Bear
description: A tall, tan, brown, and pink bear who operates the Bistrom store.

name: Penguin Book
description: A sentient book in Book World that waddles on tiny feet and shares facts about penguins.

name: Finncat
description: A feline space lieutenant with a penchant for flopping into the captain’s chair or onto a warm lap, he is currently found haunting the galley with a busy air, far too preoccupied with the kitchen's business to indulge in his usual repertoire of snuggles.

name: Bert
description: Stepping from the quiet ink of a library book to join the trek into the deep dark, this classic figure from a shared basement apartment maintains the rhythmic precision and meditative focus of a sleep-story weaver. Formerly the host of grand pigeon galas who folded his roommate Ernie’s vibrant chaos into serene harmony, he now applies a caretaker’s grace to the encroaching shadows. Whether smoothing mud-stained hems into crisp geometries or sorting through the abyss’s chaotic clutter, he treats the exploration of the unknown as a soothing ritual—a singular, exacting discipline of folding the world’s wilder reaches back into a state of restorative order.

name: Jeff
description: One of the many names mentioned for the bird.

name: Miss Maryanne
description: A teacher at school mentioned by Izzy.

name: The Librarian
description: The dwarf who manages the Great Library and welcomes Seeker to watch the artisans work.

name: Mistress
description: A character who fixes cars.

name: Felisa
description: The father (Dada) in Seeker's family.

name: Wizard Bobizard
description: Seeker's friend, a wizard who often experiments with potions.

name: Pooh
description: A honey-loving resident of the Hundred Acre Wood.

name: Pizone
description: A member of Mistress Mouse's extended family.

name: Ploplly
description: The first traffic cone to volunteer for the stack.

name: Speedy Birdy
description: A fast-moving red bird featured in Hattie's artistic creation.

name: Thisco
description: A brave and energetic Mischief Mole, this intrepid explorer serves as Disco’s dedicated partner on daring undersea adventures. Balancing a vital topographical mission with a penchant for planned mischief, he charts paths from the loamy forest floor to the aquarium’s glass-walled depths. He is as compassionate as he is whimsical, known for guiding wandering moss to sanctuary and crafting delicate, ephemeral butterflies from the very dust he unearths.

name: Sophie
description: The resilient owner and artisan of the Eat and Greet Bakery is a vibrant pink mouse with an iconic, rounded silhouette, typically found in a pink dress and a flour-dusted blue apron. A master of alchemical confections, she kneads life into glowing pink slime alongside her loyal companion, Wenden—a slime mouse who studies the science of her color-mixing. Her delicate appearance belies a legendary endurance, famously proven when she carried her brother Winston through the freezing wilds to the gates of Snow World.

name: Octopus
description: A large purple creature with many tentacles who joins the group.

name: Goober the Gopher
description: A friendly, non-dangerous gopher who lives in a tunnel and loves nibbling on garden vegetables.

name: Orange Dragonets
description: Dimitar's castle assistants who serve snacks and help around the castle.

name: Snisko Parry Disco
description: The King of the Ice who lives in a sparkling ice castle.

name: Mr. Laro
description: One of the many names mentioned for the bird.

name: Mama Wolf
description: This silver-furred matriarch, a figure of striking grace from the story’s illustrations, bears the heavy mantle of a mother searching for her lost cub. Her amber gaze is clouded with a fierce, maternal ache as she tends to the rhythmic task of pumping milk, desperate to keep her life-giving strength ready for the moment her little one is returned to her side.

name: Robin
description: A bird friend mentioned in the Forest Friends book.

name: Booty the Mouse
description: A mouse who builds a house for his toys using Magnatiles.

name: Bingo
description: A friend of Bluey and one of the many birthday party guests.

name: Sea Cat
description: A mysterious feline inhabitant living at the very bottom of the ocean floor.

name: Same the Fishy
description: A character who has a robot in need of repair.

name: Moueks
description: A baby space rock who is homesick and looking for its family.

name: Ba-tally fish
description: One of the ten fishes in the aquarium.

name: Isabella the Cat Superhero
description: A persona Izzy takes on during the rescue.

name: Wibble
description: A very tall giraffe who enjoys blowing bubbles and is remarkably creative.

name: Mischief Mouse
description: Reigning from a purple-striped Jovian castle, this affable mouse King—a playful-named companion to Pinecone Mouse—is a seasoned adventurer, guardian of the Underground Library, and Hattie’s steadfast ally. Between savoring artisanal cheeses and awaiting a rugged cardboard replacement for his fragile Lego hat, he spends leisure hours meticulously constructing and gleefully smashing soaring towers. A pancake-loving monarch who once tended shop for mountain-dwelling traffic cones, his cosmic quests recently shifted from the stars to the speedway; having borrowed a tow truck from Mistress Mouse, he proved a formidable competitor who nearly clinched a stunning victory. Whether piloting starships or joining the group’s latest trek to Nana’s house, he remains a vigilant protector and devoted friend across the galaxy.

name: Dragoness
description: The mother dragon whose great nest is mentioned at the start of the book.

name: Finn Cat
description: A character featured in a coloring picture with Worry-Worry Whale.

name: Who the Owl
description: A friendly owl who provides air transportation for Hattie and Izzy.

name: Friendly Mooker
description: A resident of the planet of the Mookers who greets Seeker and Buddy upon their arrival.

name: Allego
description: Zudy Dragon's mother.

name: Alan
description: A calm friend from Sesame Street who narrates sleep stories.

name: Sherry
description: A mouse mentioned as part of the group playing in the living room.

name: Weasel
description: A white furry creature that sleeps under the snow during the winter.

name: The Worm
description: A bug that lives in the mud and writes poetry about muck.

name: Baby Owls
description: Tiny nocturnal birds who also receive starry hats from Hattie.

name: Wesley the Worm
description: A slow but friendly wriggly worm who joins the group on their rainy walk.

name: Bug
description: A character mentioned in Hattie's bedtime book who gets cozy with the witch.

name: Finn the Cat
description: An adventurous cat who wears a special purple wool hat knitted by Hatty.

name: Gina
description: A small, cerulean baby angler fish of the deep-sea family, now seen swaying gently as a passenger aboard the clattering playground trolley.

name: Buddy the Mouse
description: Seeker’s resourceful mouse companion is a keen-eyed problem solver who joined the journey to the planet of the Mookers. Empowered by a transformative new potion, this tiny ally navigates extraterrestrial perils with sharp wit, serving as a vital anchor on their strange cosmic quest.

name: Splownfish
description: One of Hattie's friends who helps build a Lego aquarium.

name: Jengia
description: A helpful digger who builds a multi-step playhouse for Hattie.

name: Captain Daddy
description: The co-pilot and mission captain who assists Isabella in navigating the stars.

name: Pakruder Worm
description: A tiny worm who was initially squeaking like a mouse but searched for her own unique sound.

name: Victor Too
description: Another companion in Hattie's group of friends.

name: Mischief Moles
description: A group of adventurous moles who invite Papa Mole to explore under a bed.

name: Mama Robot
description: The baby robot's mother who waits for her at their multi-colored metal house.

name: Mea Mayhem
description: An important superhero with the power to stop time who takes charge of the investigation.

name: Melba
description: A member of Mischief Mouse's family.

name: Mailman
description: A person who unknowingly contributes to the chaos by delivering even more kibble.

name: Grandma Mole
description: An elder mole who tries out various chairs and promptly falls asleep.

name: Lily
description: The world’s tallest mouse is a guardian scholar of monumental power and studious grace, serving as the living pillar of a communal house where he hoists the massive roof with peerless strength. Between shifts at the Pepperoni Street tape store and classes at the local school, this friend of Mistress Mouse finds quiet joy building with Legos or coloring in the baby lounge alongside his many brothers. Adorned in his signature shell necklace and a fresh bespoke hat from Haddy, he remains a gentle soul whose immense physical duty is matched only by his dedicated, playful heart.

name: Mickey
description: One of Mistress Mouse’s storied stuffy mice, this famous plush adventurer is a visionary benefactor who manifests fragrant blooms from magic Legos and pilots his Mousecar through lightless depths. Whether arming moles for Kitty’s investigations or securing solutions for Frasgle, he remains fiercely loyal to Minnie, Mole, Izzy, and Hattie. Accompanied by a cheerful infant and shadowed by a friend’s disappearance, his haste to reach the spires of Peacock’s castle has left him without essential provisions, miring him in a sudden, hungry peril.

name: Asasta
description: A mole employee at the aquarium who manages the special exhibits and greets guests.

name: Lieutenant Avery
description: A crew member who chews on her space bug and makes everyone's beds.

name: Zilla
description: A zebra who provides a doll's comb to help brush a messy mane.

name: Miss Plier
description: A mouse mechanic who is skilled at fixing broken crowns using tools like wrenches and screwdrivers.

name: Muffy
description: A friend of Fox who specializes in fixing dents in the ship's walls.

name: Zoe Rodda
description: The final patient of the day who received treatment for a sprained tail.

name: Pistis Mouse
description: An adventurous mouse who enjoys driving his car and building workspaces for his toys.

name: Mama Fox
description: A fox who lives in an underground burrow and provides star stickers for the hats.

name: Pooh Bear
description: A honey-loving Super Sleuth whose likeness is woven into the game upon the wall, renowned for his singular insight that the group’s direst problems are often rooted in nothing more than a collective, gnawing hunger.

name: Bepin
description: A mouse who helps the worm find the perfect sound.

name: Daddy Mouse
description: A surprise late entrant to the race who drives an orange two-wheeled penguin car.

name: Pilot Isabella
description: The skilled pilot of the crew's spaceship.

name: Tigger
description: A friendly and boisterous Super Sleuth from the Hundred Acre Wood, this bouncing adventurer zips into action on a scooter, bringing a whirlwind of enthusiasm to help his friends and aid the local mice.

name: Flutter
description: A sniffling resident of Croquet Road, this mouse braves a lingering cold to join the festivities as a cherished guest at Ova’s birthday celebration.

name: Demitar
description: A winged friend of Icicle who flies down the mountain to catch fish for the group.

name: Demora
description: Dimetar's mother.

name: Ovage
description: Seeker's creative and interesting mother who encourages his curiosity and learning.

name: Porpy
description: One of the orange traffic cones.

name: Scratchcat
description: One of the many cats that joins the adventure to Kibble World.

name: Dad Mouse
description: A devoted patriarch who flourishes in the company of his kin, Surprise Mouse’s father is her most steadfast creative collaborator, lending a patient hand to her artistic projects while cherishing the simple warmth of shared family time.

name: June-June the Zebra
description: A zebra who needs her mane brushed before having her picture taken.

name: Hazel
description: A kitten who arrives with dozens of other cats and helps narrate the story.

name: Mouse Family
description: A family of mice living in a large castle in the Arctic who host the adventurers and offer ice cheese.

name: Hattie the Mouse
description: A nimble, friendly mouse of Possible Street and loyal friend to Izzy and Seeker, this brave artisan is the wife of Dimitar and mistress of the Workshop of Hats—a weathered hollow tree sanctuary on Cornell Street scented with cedar, ink, and peanut butter toast. Clad in her signature red cloak and pointy hat, she is a resourceful hatmaker whose spirit was forged against massive diggers and the rain-slicked Floofer Cloud. Within her paint-stained home, she carefully curates her husband’s library alongside her own hand-painted volumes while confronting a baffling supply mystery; the discovery of curious clover stickers signals a gathering shadow of intrigue she is determined to unravel.

name: Joe-fish
description: One of the ten fishes in the aquarium.

name: Caribbean Amphibian
description: Immortalized in the verses of a coastal song, the emerald frog perched amidst the coconut fronds is the transcendent architect of the world’s chronicle, a silent co-author who scratches out the narrative alongside the characters themselves.

name: Pistapone
description: A member of Mistress Mouse's extended family.

name: Miss Lynn
description: One of the teachers at Izzy's school.

name: Bezoma
description: A member of Mistress Mouse's extended family.

name: The Moles
description: Weary from a day of retrofitting a discarded plastic bottle into a deep-sea vessel, this clan of master-builder moles retreats into their earthy burrow to huddle for sleep. Their velvet fur is still dusted with the shavings of their craft, a communal exhaustion settling over the family who spent their waking hours welding bottle-cap hatches and securing the scavenged gears of their translucent submarine.

name: Raccoon
description: A friend of the Pooky family who loves lanterns and is celebrated at a large birthday party.

name: Julie Anne
description: A person mentioned as being part of Izzy's community.

name: Otter
description: A small companion who repeats the words of the wizards.

name: Pout-Pout Fish
description: A underwater friend who helps Izzy search for a missing treasure.

name: Slime Teacher
description: The encouraging instructor at Slime School.

name: Sassafras
description: Zoe's cat.

name: Tonsil Patient
description: A nervous patient who underwent a major tonsillectomy while listening to soothing music.

name: Chipmunk
description: A small creature heard crunching on a walnut near the Crystal Mountain.

name: Agnes
description: A pet bunny mentioned as a companion to the storyteller.

name: ER
description: One of the toys sitting on Dad's legs.

name: Taylee Mouse
description: A cheese-loving mouse who accompanies Isabella and rides on Dimitar's back.

name: Plotty Mouse
description: A wandering soul with a penchant for long rambles and the crisp snap of garden carrots. A loyal companion to Pinecone Mouse, they are a spirited fixture at every vegetable soup feast, relishing the steam of a shared pot and the earthy sweetness of harvested roots.

name: Hattie Mouse
description: An excited older sister mouse who prepares for her new sibling's arrival.

name: Dammertocker
description: One of the companions who accompanied Zoot to the Floofer Cloud.

name: Winnie the Pooh
description: A hungry yet generous soul, this bear shares his honey and ladder with Hattie on their quest for the perfect golden harvest. By stilling his heart to hear the world’s quiet whispers, he has mastered the art of patient reflection, teaching his companions that even the greatest obstacles yield to the gentle power of waiting and thoughtful stillness.

name: Pouska
description: Dimitar's blue and green dragonet assistant who guides Seeker's group to the castle.

name: Arthur
description: One of Lily's brothers who plays Legos with Mistress Mouse.

name: Sinaphia
description: A blue tropical fish who, along with Muska Scaphor, was adopted as a pet by Seeker and Dematar.

name: Floofero
description: One of Floofy's Floofer friends.

name: Space Rocks
description: Sentient, crying entities found floating in space that speak their own unique language.

name: Misko
description: A mole character from a story told within the main narrative.

name: Smokey
description: One of Nana's new cats who ends up joining the feline gathering.

name: Baby Robot
description: A small robot made of electronics and LEDs who goes on an adventure for honey.

name: The Slime Creature
description: A silver slime sculpture with snake-like limbs that dances after a magic spell.

name: The Floofers
description: Tiny, pom-pom-like, and irrepressibly bouncy, these magical ball-shaped denizens of the Floofer Clouds leap with wide-eyed grace across resilient, vaporous peaks. Sustained by a vital dependency on floof-berries, these restless creatures possess a staggering verticality and a vibrant energy so potent that falling asleep remains an elusive feat.

name: Hoo-Hoo
description: An owl neighbor of Victor who gets photographed after taking a shower.

name: Papa Mouse

name: Avery
description: Now christened [Name], this diminutive mole is the newest addition to Izzy’s family and Hattie’s velvety baby sister. A tiny voyager often depicted in portraits wearing oversized clothes, she is a slumbering resident aboard the ship, finding bliss in milk-filled dreams within her cozy "house" upon the storyteller’s knee. To protect [Name]’s fragile rest, the crew maintains a state of hushed reverence, ensuring the vessel remains a quiet sanctuary for its smallest, most loyal passenger.
